category_sources: source_facts.description says open client for Cisco AnyConnect VPN; official homepage describes a cross-platform multi-protocol SSL VPN client.
display_name_sources: Official infradead.org homepage and download pages use OpenConnect.
docs_sources: Official OpenConnect website is the rendered documentation surface; GitHub mirror README says documentation lives at infradead.org/openconnect.
repo_sources: Official OpenConnect download page lists the latest source code git repository and gitweb URL at git.infradead.org/users/dwmw2/openconnect.git.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists supported VPN protocols including Cisco AnyConnect and GlobalProtect; source_facts.executables contains openconnect CLI.
